title: Monster Girl Equinox
description: Adds monster girls and other things
body:
# **Monster girl equinox**

You got it right, this mod adds monster girls and some other things


**Other things being:**

- 4 new monster girl mobs (look in the gallery)

- 2 structures - small and large "anthills"

- 3 tools - 2 platinum tools and Akunaki Ue sword

- loot that each monster girl drops

- new plant - cave cotton

Have fun I guess

**PLEASE use JEI or a similar mod for recipes**


<details>
<summary>Extreme bait</summary>

(^_^)

</details>
